name: Cellar
note: Cost = T1 base (5) + 1 food (3). (Starter — no tech.)

name: Granary
note: Cost = T1 base (5) + 2 food (6). (Starter — no tech.)

name: Trading Post
note: Cost = T1 base (5) + 1 gold (4). (Starter — no tech.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: T1 base 5 + food 3 + prod 3 = 11. Requires Foraging.

name: Smokehouse
note: T1 base 5 + food 3 + happiness 3 = 11. Requires Cooking.

name: Mill
note: T2 base 10 + 2 food (6) + prod (3) − 1 hp adder = 18. Requires Mill + Farming. maxHp 2.

name: Tavern
note: T2 base 10 + 2 happiness (6) + maxHp adder = 18. Requires Beer Brewing.

name: Library
note: T2 base 10 + 2 sci (8) + hp = 20. Requires Reading.

name: Walls
note: T2 base 10 + def (5) + +3 maxHp adder (8 → 4 hp tier) ≈ 19. Requires Walls + Masonry. maxHp 4.

name: Watchtower
note: T2 base 10 + def (5) + happy (3) = 18. Requires Town Watch. maxHp 3.

name: Barracks
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + hp adder = 17. Requires Stick Fighting. maxHp 3.

name: Forge
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + prod (3) + hp = 19. Requires Smithing.

name: Pottery
note: T2 base 10 + prod (3) + gold (4) = 17. Requires Ceramics.

name: Stables
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + horse (3) + hp adder = 21. Requires Horseback Riding.

name: Apothecary
note: T2 base 10 + sci (4) + happy (3) = 17, +hp = 18. Requires Chemistry.

name: Workshop
note: T2 base 10 + 2 prod (6) + hp = 18. Requires Apprenticeship. maxHp 3.

name: Quarry Camp
note: T2 base 10 + 2 prod (6) + hp = 18. Requires Mining.

name: Looms
note: T2 base 10 + prod (3) + happy (3) + hp adder = 18. Requires Weaving.

name: Drill Yard
note: T2 base 10 + 2 atk (10) + hp adder = 24. Requires Tactics.

name: Tower
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + hp adder = 32. Requires Walls + Masonry. maxHp 4.

name: Mint
note: T3 base 18 + 2 gold (8) = 26. Requires Currency.

name: Market
note: T3 base 18 + 2 gold (8) = 26. Requires Markets.

name: Bank
note: T3 base 18 + 4 gold (16) + hp adder = 36. Requires Banking + Currency.

name: Counting House
note: T3 base 18 + 3 gold (12) + sci (4) − 2 = 32. Requires Banking.

name: Print Shop
note: T3 base 18 + 2 sci (8) + gold (4) = 30. Requires Printing.

name: Cathedral
note: T3 base 18 + 4 happy (12) + sci (4) + hp = 36. Requires Religion + Masonry.

name: School
note: T3 base 18 + 3 sci (12) + happy (3) + hp adder = 36. Requires Pedagogy + Library.

name: Aqueduct
note: T3 base 18 + 2 food (6) + 2 happy (6) + hp = 32. Requires Plumbing + Bridges.

name: Ironworks
note: T3 base 18 + 3 prod (9) + atk (5) + hp = 35. Requires Smelting + Smithing.

name: Armory
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + atk (5) = 33. Requires Armor. maxHp 4.

name: Garrison
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + happy (3) + hp = 33. Requires Logistics. maxHp 4.

name: Citadel
note: T3 base 18 + 3 def (15) + hp adder = 41. Requires Walls + Engineering. maxHp 4.

name: Fortress
note: T3 base 18 + 5 def (25) + hp = 51 (rounded down). Requires Walls + Plate Armor. maxHp 4.

name: Palace
note: T3 base 18 + 4 gold (16) + 3 happy (9) + hp = 50 (rounded). Requires Leadership + Architecture. maxHp 4.
